ashenmaw-crown.name: Crown of the Hollow King
ashenmaw-crown.description: The golden ward-thread crown torn from the Hollow King himself. It whispers, but you've learned not to listen.

wellspring-blade.name: Wellspring Edge
wellspring-blade.description: A sword quenched in the black water of the Wellspring. Its edge cuts through hope and armor alike.

thessaly-grimoire.name: Thessaly's Unfinished Thesis
thessaly-grimoire.description: The revenant's research notes on the corruption. Reading them grants terrible clarity — and terrible power.

castellus-oath-shield.name: Castellus's Oathbound Shield
castellus-oath-shield.description: The shield of the warden who guarded a door for a century. It still remembers its duty — and shares it with the bearer.

ashenmaw-vestments.name: Vestments of the Drowned Chorus
ashenmaw-vestments.description: Robes woven from burial linens and threaded with golden wards. The voices of the ossuary sing through them, but quietly.

crypt-warden-gauntlets.name: Gauntlets of the Eternal Watch
crypt-warden-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets pried from the undying wardens of Ashenmaw. They grip weapons with inhuman certainty.

bone-amalgam-ring.name: Ring of the Amalgam
bone-amalgam-ring.description: A ring carved from the fused bones of the amalgam. It reshapes itself to fit any finger — disturbingly.

shade-whisper-amulet.name: Amulet of Silenced Whispers
shade-whisper-amulet.description: An amulet that absorbs the whispers of the shades. Wearing it brings unsettling silence — and clarity.

ashenmaw-treads.name: Treads of the Descender
ashenmaw-treads.description: Boots worn smooth by the endless stairs of Ashenmaw. They make no sound on stone — or bone.
